component.name: OpenVPN3 GUI
component.summary: A native GNOME frontend for OpenVPN 3

description.p: OpenVPN3 GUI is a complete graphical frontend for the openvpn3-linux client. It covers profile management (import, export, ACLs, tags), connection management with interactive authentication (passwords, OTP, PKCS#11), live logs, session inspection, network diagnostics, desktop notifications, tray integration, and automation — without ever needing the terminal.
